# Chapter 02 Draft

## Draft

This is a placeholder prose draft for proving the save gate. It is not final story text. It exists only to prove Kayock Writer can preview draft save targets safely before any write action exists.

## Source Chapter Card

- Conflict: The clues are old, deliberately hidden, and possibly bait.
